back_translation: Beloved, this letter is the second one I am writing to you. In both letters, I have stirred up your pure thinking by reminding-the-memory
So that you would recall the words that have been spoken beforehand by the holy prophets, and the commandment of our Lord and Savior, that He gave through your apostles
Above all, you must understand that in the last times, scoffers will come, they will scoff and walk according to their own desires
They will say, ‘Where is the promise concerning His coming? For since the fathers fell asleep, all things have remained the same as from the beginning of creation’
Because they intentionally overlook the fact that the heavens have existed since long ago, and the earth was formed from water and by water, by the word of God
Through those things, the world in that age was flooded with water and perished
But the heavens and the earth in the present have been stored up for fire, by the same word, kept for the day of judgment and destruction of unrighteous people
Beloved, do not overlook this one thing, that ‘one day with the Lord is like a thousand years, and a thousand years is like one day’
The Lord is not slow concerning the promise, as some understand to be slowness, but He is patient with you all, not wishing for any to perish, but wishing for all to repent

But the day of the Lord will come like a thief. On that day, the heavens will pass away with a roaring sound, the created elements will be burned and dissolved, and the earth and the works on it will be exposed
Since all things will be destroyed in this way, what kind of people ought you to be? You ought to conduct yourselves in holiness and devotion-toward-God
While you wait and hasten the coming of the day of God, on that day, the heavens will be burned by fire and dissolved, and the created elements will be burned and melted
But according to His promise, we wait for new heavens and a new earth, where righteousness dwells
Therefore, beloved, while you wait for these things, strive to be those without blot and blemish, and to have peace in His sight
And consider that the patience of our Lord is salvation, just as Paul, our beloved brother, has written to you according to the wisdom that has been given to him

Just as he has spoken in all of his letters about these things. In those letters there are some things that are hard to understand, which foolish and unstable people have distorted, just as they distort the other Scriptures, leading themselves to their own destruction
Therefore, beloved, since you know these things beforehand, be on your guard, so that you will not be carried away by the error of the lawless, and fall from your stability
But grow in the grace and knowledge of our Lord Jesus Christ and Savior. May glory be to Him both now and until the day of eternity. Amen
